mapper.select: SELECT * FROM courses WHERE course_code = #{code} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM courses WHERE org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_code
SELECT * FROM courses WHERE course_type = #{type} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_code

SELECT c.id, c.course_code, c.course_name, c.course_type, c.credit, c.hours, c.semester_id, c.org_unit_id, c.teacher_name, c.description, c.status, c.created_at, c.updated_at, o.unit_name as org_unit_name, s.semester_name, s.academic_year FROM courses c LEFT JOIN org_units o ON c.org_unit_id = o.id LEFT JOIN semesters s ON c.semester_id = s.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM courses WHERE semester_id = #{semesterId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY course_code
